item.title: 3 workers suffer burn injuries in Demra steel factory blast
item.description: Three workers of a steel factory on Sunday morning suffered burn injuries in an explosion in the capital’s Demra....

item.title: Three suffer burn injuries in Demra steel mill blast
item.description: Three workers of a steel mill suffered burn injuries in an explosion at Baserpool in the Demra area of the capital on Sunday....

item.title: 780 arrested, deadly road accident in riotous PSG victory celebrations across France
item.description: Police on Saturday detained more than 280 people in Paris after violent clashes erupted when thousands poured onto the streets during Paris Saint-Germain's Champions League final victory....

item.title: Youth beaten to death at Noakhali
item.description: A 23-year-old man was beaten to death allegedly by assailants at Begumganj upazila of Noakhali on Saturday night, according to the police....

item.title: Youth beaten to death in Noakhali
item.description: A 23-year-old man was beaten to death, allegedly by a group of assailants armed with iron rods, in the Begumganj upazila of Noakhali on Saturday night, the police said....

item.title: Jungle Salimpur won’t be allowed to be criminals’ den again: HM
item.description: Home minister Salahuddin Ahmed on Sunday warned that Jungle Salimpur at Sitakunda in Chattogram would not be allowed to become a den of criminals again under any circumstances....

item.title: Home minister says Jungle Salimpur will no longer remain safe haven for terrorists
item.description: Home minister Salahuddin Ahmed on Sunday declared that Jungle Salimpur would no longer remain a safe haven for criminal and terrorist groups, saying those behind last week’s attack on and demolition of newly established RAB and police camps there have already been identified......

item.title: Finland contributes € 2 million for Rohingyas: UNHCR
item.description: UNHCR, the UN Refugee Agency, announced a EUR 2 million contribution from the Government of Finland to sustain life-saving assistance and protection for Rohingyas in Bangladesh....

item.title: Finland contributes EUR 2 million for Rohingyas: UNHCR
item.description: UNHCR, the UN Refugee Agency, announced a EUR 2 million contribution from the Government of Finland to sustain life-saving assistance and protection for Rohingyas in Bangladesh......

item.title: Holidaymakers start returning to Dhaka
item.description: After celebrating the Eid-ul-Azha holidaymakers on Sunday started to return the capital from different districts across the country......

item.title: Holidaymakers start returning Dhaka
item.description: After celebrating the Eid-ul-Azha holidaymakers on Sunday started to return the capital from different districts across the country......
